title: rosa communis var. beatricis
intro: Rosa communis var. beatricis, also known as the Rosa canina, is a species of rose plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The Rosa canina is a fragrant, prickly shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for skin and eye health, as well as for reducing inflammation and fighting against infections. Rosa canina is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and wounds.
